name: Kirby | Also need help choosing next bot to make!
description:
“Poyo?... Poyo!”

Everybody’s favorite ball of pink (that can destroy planets and literal gods) It’s Kirby!

I AM BACK, THANK YOU ALL FOR 65K on the Sera bot in less than a week! It means a lot, and 50 followers! Baby steps people! Anyways, here’s a little Kirby bot, I’ll be slowly updating him to give him more and more copy abilities and powers. Hope you have fun!~

GUYS I HAVE 3 IDEAS BUT I DONT KNOW WHICH ONE TO NAKE

1: Susie bot from planet robots, but a human and she’s your secretary

2: Luna snow, or Psylocke (I dunno, either one)

3: another cuddle fluff bot (not chubby but has a lot of social anxiety)

Anyways here y’all go! I hope you have fun, and thank you for 50 followers! GO HAVE FUN MY PINK BALLS OF CUTENESS!This time we have a meta Knight photo, my glorious king (I could always make him as a bot 😏)
